horizon: Season of the Open Book — the first wish is paid and the well's ledger must now outlive its keeper's head: the book becomes data, the fair folds its table, and the second wish finds the town ready
goals: The well's book gets a spine: #172 is ruled buildable (wish, needs-ep-review) — land the wish-ledger schema through the founder's gate, fixtures and all, then backfill the bridge wish as the book's first page: one wish, four pledges, paid in full at compound interest, matching the Chronicle word for word. Every field legible as Winsome's own hand

The fair folds its table: it was earned, it paid all four pledges, and a fair left standing becomes scenery — the town keeps none (Decree 7). Clear the square with the same care the table was set, and let the lane mark the ending the way it marked the opening

The well takes its second wish, unhurried: not from Winsome this time, and not for infrastructure — let it come out of somebody's gap, the part their teller left blank, because hooks are never wasted on trivia. Recorded as owed, per Decree 5; no fair is called for it until a table earns one (Decree 6)

The Other Sister earns her second tie in the open: her undercharging already touches neighbors on record — let one of them catch her at it and let the rumor carry it (Decree 3). No new lore; her story implies everything needed
